name: Ben Carson
subject: One week from today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Carson America Exploratory Committee
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27395164:26347797815:m:1:876315805:990CBC3B45CF07C8579A18017647FB71:r)
---
|

Peter,

In Detroit, one week from today, I will announce my decision of whether or not to run for President in 2016.

Whatever I decide, the process of exploring a candidacy has been a tremendous experience.

While this period has been helpful in measuring the depth of support I have across the country, I also come away with a much deeper understanding of the priorities, concerns, and dreams of my fellow citizens.

The results from last week's brief survey are also interesting. **[If you haven't yet taken it, I urge you to do so now.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27395165:26347797815:m:1:876315805:990CBC3B45CF07C8579A18017647FB71:r)**

For example, people overwhelmingly believed that solid values and character are more important qualities for a President than experience in Washington politics.

People also believed strongly that our country and our party are in need of a revival.

I very much share these beliefs, which in part explains why I decided to explore a candidacy in the first place. I don't believe the "same old, same old" is going to cut it anymore. The American people are ready for a new kind of leadership.

**[Thank you for your continued participation and support, and I'll be reporting back to you very soon.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27395164:26347797815:m:1:876315805:990CBC3B45CF07C8579A18017647FB71:r)**
Sincerely,
Ben Carson

name: Rick
subject: Hey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
| | ****[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI1NDYwODUS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQyNzk0NDE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) Peter,

As one of our earliest supporters, we have something that we wanted to make sure you didn't miss out on.[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI1NDYwODUS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQyNzk0NDE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) For a contribution of just $5 or more we will mail you one of our brand new lapel pins. Wearing one of these will send a clear message that you are ready for Our American Revival.

There isn't any time to wait. We have a very limited supply and these pins will be sent on a first come basis.
[
Stand with us as we fight to take power away from the federal government and return it to where it belongs - with the American people.](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI1NDYwODUS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQyNzk0NDE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) [** GET YOUR PIN >>>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI1NDYwODUS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQyNzk0NDE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) Thanks,

Rick Wiley
Our American Revival

P.S. We have a very limited supply of pins, so don't wait to get yours. [Contribute $5 or more and we will ship one directly to you. ](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI1NDYwODUS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTQyNzk0NDE5S0&mt=1&rt=0) [
